    "page_title": "Explore",
    "frame_description": "The carousel content shifts again as the user continues browsing the tasks."

    "interaction_target": "Filter icon",
    "page_title": "Explore",
    "frame_description": "The user interacts with the filter icon located in the header next to the notification bell."
  },
  {
    "type": "change_ui_state",

    "description": "The 'Filter Opportunities' modal slides up from the bottom of the screen.",

    "interaction_target": "Filter Opportunities modal",
    "page_title": "Explore",
    "frame_description": "A white modal overlay appears, presenting various filter categories like Task Type, Duration, and Pay Rate."
  },
  {
    "type": "select",

    "time_end_ms": 61100,
    "description": "User selects the '10-30 min' duration filter option.",

    "interaction_target": "10-30 min duration button",
    "page_title": "Explore",
    "frame_description": "The '10-30 min' button in the Duration section is highlighted in blue to indicate selection."
  },

  },
